untranslatable_reason: Signal requires external event calendar data (government reports, economic data releases) which is not available in the allowed indicators list. The core logic depends on scheduled economic events, not price/volume/technical indicators. Additionally, implied volatility expansion anticipation and specific IV percentile thresholds require IV indicator or option-chain data not present in allowed indicators. Position sizing, straddle construction, and event-relative exit timing cannot be expressed with available technical indicators alone.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally event-driven and requires: (1) external economic calendar integration, (2) implied volatility data or options chain metrics, (3) event-relative position management rules. The available technical indicators (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, etc.) cannot capture the anticipatory IV expansion logic or event scheduling requirements that form the core of this trading rule. A proper implementation would need custom event triggers and IV-specific indicators beyond the current allowed set.
